title: Ask: best resources for learning Z80 assembly?
description: I want to write a game for my ZX Spectrum. Where should I start?
description_plain: I want to write a game for my ZX Spectrum. Where should I start?

comments.comment: Start with the official docs & then tackle ROM routines.
comments.comment_plain: Start with the official docs & then tackle ROM routines.
Seconded. Check out World of Spectrum.
